checks.detail: Excel roundtrip upload must reject workbooks that are not exactly one sheet.
Upload must require hidden relation-key columns so Supabase mapping is preserved.
Excel export must include exclusive area so 경산 전용면적-type corrections can be handled.
Excel export must expose source sheet/header and a human-readable row identifier.
Excel export must cover both original DB_일반 and DB_히스토리 누적 style fields.
Excel export must include a Korean/user-readable display value beside raw DB value.
Upload must block rows with broken target table, row id, or field name instead of silently dropping them.
Upload must block rows outside the selected asset scope.
Upload must enforce a row limit to avoid accidental massive submissions.
